perturbation.original_text: You hereby agree that the Confidential Information will be used solely for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Transaction and that such information will be kept confidential by you; provided that any such information may be disclosed to your officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources (such Persons hereinafter collectively being referred to as your “ Representatives ” who need to know such information for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Transaction, have been informed of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, and have been advised that such information is to be kept confidential, and provided , further , that such officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources shall not be deemed to be your Representatives unless (but solely to the extent that) you furnish Confidential Information to them.
perturbation.changed_text: You hereby agree that the Confidential Information will be used solely for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Due Diligence and that such information will be kept confidential by you; provided that any such information may be disclosed to your officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources (such Persons hereinafter collectively being referred to as your “ Representatives ” who need to know such information for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Transaction, have been informed of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, and have been advised that such information is to be kept confidential, and provided , further , that such officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources shall not be deemed to be your Representatives unless (but solely to the extent that) you furnish Confidential Information to them.
perturbation.explanation: The change replaces 'Transaction' with 'Due Diligence' in the first instance, but the rest of the section continues to use 'Transaction'. This creates confusion as to whether the confidential information is to be used solely for evaluating and implementing 'Due Diligence', but the rest of the section is still focused on 'Transaction'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You hereby agree that the Confidential Information will be used solely for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Due Diligence and that such information will be kept confidential by you; provided that any such information may be disclosed to your officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources (such Persons hereinafter collectively being referred to as your “ Representatives ” who need to know such information for the purpose of evaluating and implementing the Transaction, have been informed of the confidential nature of the Confidential Information, and have been advised that such information is to be kept confidential, and provided , further , that such officers, directors, employees, affiliates, accountants, attorneys, financial advisors, consultants, other agents or representatives and financing sources shall not be deemed to be your Representatives unless (but solely to the extent that) you furnish Confidential Information to them.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'Transaction' with 'Due Diligence' in the first instance within the definition of Confidential Information usage. However, the rest of the section continues to use 'Transaction'. This creates a contradiction because it suggests the Confidential Information should be used for 'Due Diligence', while the rest of the clause, including the definition of 'Representatives', is tied to the 'Transaction'. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, indicating that the contradiction is internal to that specific clause due to the inconsistent use of 'Due Diligence' and 'Transaction'.

perturbation.original_text: You and the Company also each agree, on behalf of itself, its affiliates and its and their respective Representatives, that it shall not, without the prior written consent of the other party hereto, disclose to any Person the fact that Confidential Information has been made available to you, that discussions or negotiations have taken place or are taking place concerning a possible Transaction or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to any such possible Transaction, including the status thereof.
perturbation.changed_text: You and the Corporation also each agree, on behalf of itself, its affiliates and its and their respective Representatives, that it shall not, without the prior written consent of the other party hereto, disclose to any Person the fact that Confidential Information has been made available to you, that discussions or negotiations have taken place or are taking place concerning a possible Transaction or any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect to any such possible Transaction, including the status thereof.
perturbation.explanation: The change replaces 'Company' with 'Corporation'. The agreement uses both throughout, making it unclear if they refer to the same entity. This affects the enforcement of the entire contract, since the obligations of 'the Company' may not be the same as 'the Corporation'
perturbation.contradicted_text: The provisions of this Agreement shall be binding solely upon and inure to the benefit of the parties hereto and their respective successors and assigns. The Company agrees that you may assign all rights, powers, privileges, and obligations under this Agreement with respect to any or all of the proposed Transaction to any of your affiliates.
perturbation.justification: The change replaces 'Company' with 'Corporation'. The explanation states that the agreement uses both terms throughout the contract, making it unclear if they refer to the same entity. This directly affects the contradicted text, which refers to 'The Company' assigning rights. If 'Company' and 'Corporation' are not the same, the assignment clause becomes ambiguous and potentially unenforceable, creating a direct contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: The term “Confidential Information” does not include any information which (a) at the time of disclosure or thereafter is generally available to or known by the public (other than as a result of its disclosure by you or your Representatives in breach of this Agreement), (b) was available to you or your Representatives on a non-confidential basis prior to disclosure by the Company, (c) becomes available to you or your Representatives on a non-confidential basis from a Person who is not known by you or your Representatives (as applicable) to be bound by a confidentiality agreement with the Company, or is not otherwise prohibited from transmitting the information to you or your Representatives (as applicable), or (d) is or was independently developed by you or your Representatives without reference to, incorporation of, or other use of any Confidential Information.
perturbation.changed_text: The term “Private Data” does not include any information which (a) at the time of disclosure or thereafter is generally available to or known by the public (other than as a result of its disclosure by you or your Representatives in breach of this Agreement), (b) was available to you or your Representatives on a non-confidential basis prior to disclosure by the Company, (c) becomes available to you or your Representatives on a non-confidential basis from a Person who is not known by you or your Representatives (as applicable) to be bound by a confidentiality agreement with the Company, or is not otherwise prohibited from transmitting the information to you or your Representatives (as applicable), or (d) is or was independently developed by you or your Representatives without reference to, incorporation of, or other use of any Confidential Information.
perturbation.explanation: The change replaces 'Confidential Information' with 'Private Data', but only in the definition. The rest of the contract continues to refer to 'Confidential Information', making it unclear which data is protected and under what terms. This is in text contradition because it create and internal contradition, the text defines something, and after that it contradicts itself by using a different term but with the same logic or reference.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Given the nature of the Confidential Information and our current discussions, the Company may be irreparably damaged by any unauthorized disclosure of any Confidential Information and you and the Company may be irreparably damaged by any unauthorized disclosure of our discussions or by any breach of this Agreement by you, the Company or the Representatives of you and the Company. Without prejudice to other rights and remedies otherwise available, you and the Company therefore agree that the other party hereto shall be entitled to seek equitable relief, including an injunction or specific performance, in the event of any breach of the provisions of this Agreement by the other party hereto or the Representatives of the other party hereto.
perturbation.justification: The change replaces 'Confidential Information' with 'Private Data' in the definition, while the rest of the contract, specifically the Contradicted Text, continues to refer to 'Confidential Information'. This creates an in-text contradiction because it's unclear which data is being protected, making the enforcement of confidentiality obligations ambiguous and potentially unenforceable. This aligns with the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction', where the contract uses different terms interchangeably without defining them, leading to conflicting obligations.

perturbation.original_text: You agree that certain Confidential Information may be deemed material non-public information under applicable securities laws. Without limitation of the other restrictions on use or transfer of Confidential Information described herein, you agree that while such information remains non-public, you will not engage, and will direct your Representatives not to engage, in any transactions in the securities of the Company in a manner which would constitute a violation of such laws.
perturbation.changed_text: You agree that certain Proprietary Information may be deemed material non-public information under applicable securities laws. Without limitation of the other restrictions on use or transfer of Confidential Information described herein, you agree that while such information remains non-public, you will not engage, and will direct your Representatives not to engage, in any transactions in the securities of the Company in a manner which would constitute a violation of such laws.
perturbation.explanation: The change replaces 'Confidential Information' with 'Proprietary Information', but only in the first instance. The rest of the paragraph, and the agreement, continues to use 'Confidential Information'. It create a contradiction, since the first phrase says that 'Proprietary Information' may be deemed material non-public information, which creates and obligaion. However, in the second part of the phrase talks about 'Confidential Information' and its restritions.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You agree that certain Proprietary Information may be deemed material non-public information under applicable securities laws. Without limitation of the other restrictions on use or transfer of Confidential Information described herein, you agree that while such information remains non-public, you will not engage, and will direct your Representatives not to engage, in any transactions in the securities of the Company in a manner which would constitute a violation of such laws.
perturbation.justification: The change replaces 'Confidential Information' with 'Proprietary Information' in the first instance but not consistently throughout the paragraph. The remainder of the paragraph, and the provided contradicted text, continues to refer to 'Confidential Information'. This creates a contradiction because the first part of the phrase now states that 'Proprietary Information' may be deemed material non-public information and creates an obligation related to Confidential Information, but the obligation references a different, previously mentioned term, creating a strong contradiction. It also follows the definition of Misaligned Terminology, since the contract uses both terms 'Confidential Information' and 'Proprietary Information' without clearly defining them, which leads to conflicting obligations.

perturbation.original_text: From the date of this Agreement until the earlier to occur of (a) 11:59 p.m. (New York time) on February 3, 2011 and (b) the execution of a definitive agreement between the Company and you relating to a Transaction, except for discussions with you regarding the Transaction, the Company and its affiliates shall not, and the Company shall cause its Representatives not to, directly or indirectly, (w) solicit or knowingly encourage inquiries or proposals with respect to any offer or proposal to (i) sell, issue or otherwise transfer any equity securities (or securities convertible or exchangeable for equity securities) of the Company or any of its subsidiaries (except in accordance with the terms of convertible securities outstanding on the date hereof and pursuant to employment arrangements entered into in the ordinary course from time to time), (ii) sell or otherwise transfer any material assets of the Company or any of its subsidiaries or (iii) effect any recapitalization, refinancing, restructuring, merger, consolidation or other business combination involving the Company or any of its subsidiaries (any of the foregoing hereinafter referred to as an “ Alternative Proposal ”), (x) solicit or encourage the initiation of (including by way of furnishing information) any inquiries or proposals regarding any Alternative Proposal, or (y) have any discussions with or provide any non-public information or data to any third party that would encourage, facilitate or further any effort or attempt to make or implement an Alternative Proposal.
perturbation.changed_text: From the date of this Agreement until the earlier to occur of (a) 11:59 p.m. (New York time) on February 3, 2011 and (b) the execution of a definitive agreement between the Corporation and you relating to a Project, except for discussions with you regarding the Transaction, the Company and its affiliates shall not, and the Company shall cause its Representatives not to, directly or indirectly, (w) solicit or knowingly encourage inquiries or proposals with respect to any offer or proposal to (i) sell, issue or otherwise transfer any equity securities (or securities convertible or exchangeable for equity securities) of the Company or any of its subsidiaries (except in accordance with the terms of convertible securities outstanding on the date hereof and pursuant to employment arrangements entered into in the ordinary course from time to time), (ii) sell or otherwise transfer any material assets of the Company or any of its subsidiaries or (iii) effect any recapitalization, refinancing, restructuring, merger, consolidation or other business combination involving the Company or any of its subsidiaries (any of the foregoing hereinafter referred to as an “ Alternative Proposal ”), (x) solicit or encourage the initiation of (including by way of furnishing information) any inquiries or proposals regarding any Alternative Proposal, or (y) have any discussions with or provide any non-public information or data to any third party that would encourage, facilitate or further any effort or attempt to make or implement an Alternative Proposal.
perturbation.explanation: The change replaces 'Company' with 'Corporation' and 'Transaction' with 'Project' at the beginning of the paragraph. However, the rest of the paragraph continues to use 'Company' and 'Transaction'. This creates an internal contradiction, in the paragraph, since the beginning talks about 'Corporation' and 'Project' and after that the last of the text talks about 'Company' and 'Transaction', it is not clear to which one it is talking.
perturbation.contradicted_text: From the date of this Agreement until the earlier to occur of (a) 11:59 p.m. (New York time) on February 3, 2011 and (b) the execution of a definitive agreement between the Corporation and you relating to a Project, except for discussions with you regarding the Transaction, the Company and its affiliates shall not, and the Company shall cause its Representatives not to, directly or indirectly, (w) solicit or knowingly encourage inquiries or proposals with respect to any offer or proposal to (i) sell, issue or otherwise transfer any equity securities (or securities convertible or exchangeable for equity securities) of the Company or any of its subsidiaries (except in accordance with the terms of convertible securities outstanding on the date hereof and pursuant to employment arrangements entered into in the ordinary course from time to time), (ii) sell or otherwise transfer any material assets of the Company or any of its subsidiaries or (iii) effect any recapitalization, refinancing, restructuring, merger, consolidation or other business combination involving the Company or any of its subsidiaries (any of the foregoing hereinafter referred to as an “ Alternative Proposal ”), (x) solicit or encourage the initiation of (including by way of furnishing information) any inquiries or proposals regarding any Alternative Proposal, or (y) have any discussions with or provide any non-public information or data to any third party that would encourage, facilitate or further any effort or attempt to make or implement an Alternative Proposal.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'Company' with 'Corporation' and 'Transaction' with 'Project' at the beginning of the paragraph, but the rest of the paragraph continues to use 'Company' and 'Transaction'. This creates a direct in-text contradiction because the beginning refers to 'Corporation' and 'Project', while the rest refers to 'Company' and 'Transaction', making it unclear which entity and event the paragraph is about. This aligns with the Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction definition, where the interchangeable use of terms without clear definitions leads to conflicting obligations. The changed text is also the contradicted text, so the contradiction occurs in the same location.
